summary: Iteration 3 verifies NEW features: bulk delete API + Clear All confirmation dialog + Ctrl+F focus + Escape clear. Backend: added TestBulkDelete class (2 tests) - all 23/23 pytest tests pass. Frontend: full Playwright e2e covering empty/populated states, Ctrl+F focus via dispatched KeyboardEvent, Escape clear, search filtering + no-results message, dialog open/cancel/confirm, post-clear empty state, and paste tab still rendering. All 8 frontend assertions passed. Both files and bookmarks collections are correctly purged by DELETE /api/files.

issues: Console emits repeated 'Failed to decode downloaded font' warnings for https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/cabinet-grotesk - the CSS @import is being parsed as a font file (OTS parsing error: invalid sfntVersion). The URL is a stylesheet, not a font; should be a <link rel="stylesheet"> or @import url() in CSS, not preloaded as a font. Not blocking but pollutes console.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate cabinet-grotesk font load: ensure it's referenced as a stylesheet, not preloaded as a font, to eliminate OTS parsing warnings.
(Optional) Consider rendering the 'Clear All' confirm button as a destructive variant with role=alertdialog for better accessibility.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx (line ~30): Ctrl+F window listener calls e.preventDefault() always when matched. Acceptable here since app overrides browser find, but make sure to document this UX deviation.
Sidebar.jsx: setTimeout(50ms) before focusing search after tab switch is fine but a flushSync or useLayoutEffect could be more deterministic. Low priority.
AppContext.clearAllFiles uses toast 'Cleared N file(s)' but doesn't fall back to res.data when error occurs; current try/catch is sufficient.
server.py DELETE /api/files: returns 200 even when nothing exists - correct/idempotent. No auth on bulk delete - acceptable for this single-user demo app but would need protection in multi-user prod.
FileDoc list endpoint correctly excludes _id and content; bookmark endpoints also exclude _id. Good.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed files via /api/files/paste and clean up via bulk DELETE /api/files. DB is empty at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints including bulk delete. To test new features, seed data via /api/files/paste or /api/files/upload. Clear All button only renders when files.length > 0. Ctrl+F can be triggered in Playwright via window.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {key:'f', ctrlKey:true})) since browser may intercept native shortcut. Dialog testids: clear-all-dialog, clear-all-cancel-btn, clear-all-confirm-btn, clear-all-files-btn, file-search-input.
